sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check player position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and 10 < n['pixels'] < 50:
        print(f"Player: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check bottom bar
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"Bottom bar: [{ascii_lines[63][40:60]}]")

# Check red path
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'R':
        print(f"Red: pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
